name: Solares
short_description: Solares is a unique puzzle platformer game that adds a third dimension to classic grid-based puzzle mechanics. Players move boxes to their colored locations using various mechanics. As players progress, the puzzles become more challenging and the environment changes.
detailed_description:
Solares takes classic grid-based puzzle games from the 90s like Chip's Challenge and adds a third dimension to the mix! Solares combines elements of classic games to construct the challenges you will face in this unique puzzle platformer. Move boxes to their colored locations by using an array of mechanics to solve each puzzle. Such mechanics include moving platforms and elevators to transverse the 3rd dimension. As you progress the puzzles get more challenging and the environment changes, adding more complexity to your puzzle-solving skills.

Features:
- 60 levels
